page: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with simultaneous multithreading running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server includes 3686 GB of local NVMe storage and is Premium Storage capable. In benchmark testing, the multi-core CPU performance ranks in the top tier, supported by strong multi-threaded decompression and image processing capabilities. Memory performance is highly polarized, with small-block cached read bandwidth placing in the top 25% and PassMark memory scores reaching the top 10%, while large-block uncached read and write bandwidths remain in the middle 50%.

Given its high core count, substantial local storage, and strong database operation benchmarks, the D96ads_v5 is suited for relational databases, large-scale web serving, and multi-threaded data processing. The hardware profile offers high resource density, combining high-capacity local storage and memory without the added cost of specialized GPU hardware, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for compute-heavy and storage-intensive enterprise workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure D96ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, it includes 3686 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core tests and PassMark memory scores, alongside strong database and image processing capabilities. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high local storage capacity, this instance is optimized for demanding workloads such as relational databases, multi-threaded data processing, and enterprise web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 3686 GB of local storage, optimized for database and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v5 features 96 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 3.6 TB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core performance.
tagline: A high-density virtual machine combining ninety-six dedicated AMD cores with substantial local storage for demanding multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 96 dedicated vCPUs and 48 physical cores
384.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
3686 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory performance in benchmark testing
Optimized for relational databases, web serving, and multi-threaded data processing
